analysis.reasoning: Core message: Cites Premier Li stating that peace, development, cooperation, and exchange are the trend of the times, and that China will open wider to the world and keep moving forward in opening-up, regardless of external changes. CH1: No attack on the West or depiction as hostile/immoral—absent. CH2: Emphasizes China's cooperative, peaceful, and open stance toward the world, aligning with benevolent power and pursuit of mutual engagement—supported. CH3: No historical arc or adversity—absent. CH4: While positive, it focuses on international openness rather than endorsing China's domestic political system or values—insufficient. CH5: Not about domestic governance success or achievements—absent. CH6: Not cultural/heritage—absent. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
